title: A Windy Homework Day
question: 把今天的“受够了某件事 + 攒钱买新东西 + 一阵风造成小意外 + 立刻继续”放进安全的写作业场景：你换了一把新椅子，坐到窗边，风把作业纸吹散了。用 word bank 补完整 5 个空。
example_answer: I was tired of using the old chair. I saved up for months to buy a new one. Because the room was very hot, I moved it near the window. A gust of wind swept my homework off the desk. Although the papers were everywhere, nothing was lost. I picked them up and promptly went back to work.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 说明你受够了旧椅子：我已经厌倦了用那把旧椅子
options.english_template: I was ___ using the old chair.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 说明你慢慢攒钱买新椅子：我攒了几个月的钱买了一把新的
options.english_template: I ___ for months to buy a new one.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 给出原因：因为房间很热，我把它搬到窗边
options.english_template: ___ the room was very hot, I moved it near the window.

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 用动作链描述一阵风：一阵风把我的作业从桌上吹了下去
options.english_template: A gust of wind ___ my homework off the desk.

options.label: E
options.scenario_zh: 用 promptly 收尾：我把它们捡起来，马上回去写作业
options.english_template: I picked them up and ___ went back to work.
